mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(outbound_id, -3) AS UNSIGNED)) FROM product_outbound WHERE outbound_id LIKE CONCAT('OUT-FG-', #{today}, '%')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO product_outbound ( outbound_id, product_id, lot_no, outbound_qty, outbound_date, tracking_number, client_id, manager ) VALUES ( #{outboundId}, #{productId}, #{lotNo}, #{outboundQty}, #{outboundDate}, #{trackingNumber}, #{clientId}, #{manager}
)
mapper.select: SELECT po.outbound_id, po.product_id, po.lot_no, po.outbound_qty, po.outbound_date, po.tracking_number AS trackingNumber, po.client_id, po.manager, po.remark, p.product_name, c.client_name FROM product_outbound po LEFT JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN client c ON po.client_id = c.client_id WHERE po.outbound_id = #{outboundId}
